package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_chain_built_in_handler: Handlers that construct `Where`, `Joins`, `Scopes`, or `Order` chains directly.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule057NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule057NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule057NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario057Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule057NegativeService, input Rule057NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
